purpose: Machine-readable durable directives distilled from raw user directive queue without preserving raw directive text.

directives.summary: User direct requirements outrank AI inference.

selector_hint.priority_behavior: Prefer explicit user requirements over inferred optimization paths.

directives.summary: Do not optimize the club website around booking-experience or join-club CTA flows unless explicitly reopened.

selector_hint.priority_behavior: Suppress rediscovery of booking or join-club CTA flows as default learning targets.

raw_queue_policy.reason: The raw inbox is local directive queue state and may still be consumed by topic selector during transition.
